Interface IGenerateOverviewsParameters2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control parameters for generating overview images in a mosaic dataset.

[Guid("76253922-1EDF-4E4D-9EC9-2FFADF75EBFB")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IGenerateOverviewsParameters2 : IGenerateOverviewsParameters

Properties

ComputeStatistics

Indicates whether histogram statistics are computed for the mosaic dataset, if they are missing, upon successful completion of the overview generation process.

bool ComputeStatistics { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

GenerateMissingImages 

bool GenerateMissingImages { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

GenerateStaleImages 

bool GenerateStaleImages { get; set; }

Property Value

bool
